projectDescription: Houra is an all-in-one HR platform that lets companies manage employee scheduling, attendance, payroll, training, and recruitment from a single place.
keyFeatures: AI-assisted employee scheduling with weekly views per location
Real-time attendance tracking with QR-code clock-in
Employee self-service portal (PWA, installable on mobile)
Payroll processing with advances, leave management, and audit trail
Houra Campus – courses, internal wiki, and automatic digital certificates
Houra Empleo – branded public job portal with candidate pipeline
Internal chat, social feed, and company announcements
Organizational chart and centralized employee profiles
Recruitment pipeline with customizable application forms and interview scheduling
publicApiSurface: Admin Panel – Schedules, Attendance, Employees, Payroll, Recruitment, Communication
Employee Portal – Clock-in/out, Schedule view, Leave & advance requests, Documents
Houra Campus – Course catalog, Wiki, Certificate issuance, Progress reports
Houra Empleo – Public job portal, Application forms, Candidate pipeline
Pricing plans: Starter ($45,000/mo), Growing ($70,000/mo), Scale ($198,000/mo), Empresarial (custom)
